description_long: This is a rectangular cardboard box of Barilla Farfalle pasta, featuring a predominantly blue color scheme with vibrant food imagery and branding. The front face displays the Barilla logo, the product name 'Farfalle n.65', and an appetizing image of cooked farfalle pasta garnished with basil and nuts. One side of the box contains detailed nutritional facts and ingredient information, while another side provides cooking instructions and a visual of uncooked farfalle pasta. The box also includes recycling symbols, a barcode, and a color calibration strip. The packaging is sealed and appears to be unopened, with crisp edges and a glossy printed finish. The overall appearance is clean, commercial, and designed for retail display.
description: A blue Barilla Farfalle pasta box with vivid food imagery, branding, and detailed labeling. The packaging is rectangular, glossy, and designed for retail shelves.
description_view_0: The front face shows the Barilla logo, product name, and a large image of a pasta dish with basil and nuts.
description_view_1: This side displays the nutrition facts panel, ingredient list, and additional product information in a white box.
description_view_2: The back face features the Barilla logo, product name, recycling symbol, barcode, and a color calibration strip.
description_view_3: This side highlights cooking instructions, a visual of uncooked farfalle pasta, and the Barilla logo with product details.
attribute_labeling: Barilla logo, Farfalle n.65, nutrition facts, cooking instructions, recycling symbol, barcode, color calibration strip, food imagery
